tasks.title: Paint three rooms — walls + ceilings
tasks.description: Three rooms: 4×3m, 2×2m, 2×1.5m. Walls and ceilings only. Prep, cut in, two coats emulsion. Cover floors and furniture, full clean-up after.
tasks.warning: Confirm room sizes on arrival. Two coats minimum on every wall/ceiling — patchy single coats will trigger a callback.

tasks.title: Re-seal bath with new silicone
tasks.description: Strip existing silicone, clean and dry the joint, apply fresh sanitary-grade silicone around the bath. Tool to a clean bead.
tasks.warning: Bath must be filled with water during application — empties later as silicone cures with the joint compressed.

tasks.title: Gutters — clear + replace corner piece
tasks.description: Clear all gutters and downpipes of debris on the property. Replace the broken/leaking gutter corner piece with a new fitting. Test water flow after.
tasks.warning: Working at height — ladder must be footed or use a tower if conditions require. Photograph downpipe outflow after clearing as proof.

tasks.title: Replace bathroom extractor fan (CVT2)
tasks.description: Remove existing bathroom extractor. Install supplied CVT2 fan. Wire into existing isolator switch (no new circuit). Test for proper extraction.
tasks.warning: Isolate at consumer unit before any wiring work. If existing wiring is unsuitable (no isolator, undersized cable) STOP and call Ben — do not bodge.
materials: CVT2 extractor fan (supplied by Handy Services)

tasks.title: Add 2 ventilation roof tiles
tasks.description: Install 2 vent tiles into existing roof to support extractor outflow. Slate-rip, slot in vent tile, weather-proof. Match existing roof material.
tasks.warning: Working at height — full safety. Photograph slate alignment before lifting and after install. If felt underneath is damaged, flag for separate repair.
